info.title: flight-review-server
info.description: Flight Review v2 — HTTP API server

parameters.name: include_private
parameters.description: If true, include private logs in results (default: only public)

parameters.description: ISO-8601 date string lower bound on created_at

parameters.description: ISO-8601 date string upper bound on created_at

parameters.description: Filter by software release version string (prefix match)

parameters.description: Filter: field max exceeds threshold. Format: "topic.field:value"

parameters.name: field_min
parameters.description: Filter: field min below threshold. Format: "topic.field:value"

get.summary:
GET /api/logs/:id/data/:filename -- serve Parquet/metadata files
Supports HTTP Range requests for DuckDB-WASM compatibility.
If the file does not exist in v2 storage but a v1 ULG prefix is configured,
attempts lazy conversion of the original .ulg file on first access.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Stored file name, e.g. metadata.json or a Parquet file

200.description: Stored JSON or binary log artifact

get.summary:
GET /api/logs/:id/track -- lightweight GPS track for thumbnails
Returns a downsampled GPS track (max 100 points) for canvas rendering.
Much smaller than fetching the full metadata.json (~2KB vs ~200KB).

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Column to group by (validated against allowlist in the handler).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of groups to return.

requestBody.description: ULog upload plus optional metadata fields

date_from.description: ISO-8601 date string lower bound on created_at

date_to.description: ISO-8601 date string upper bound on created_at

field_max.description: Filter: field max exceeds threshold. Format: "topic.field:value"

field_min.description: Filter: field min below threshold. Format: "topic.field:value"

has_gps.description: Filter by GPS presence (lat IS NOT NULL)

has_topic.description: Filter logs that contain this topic name

include_private.description: If true, include private logs in results (default: only public)

radius_km.description: Radius in km for geographic search

vehicle_type.description: Filter by vehicle type category (exact match)

ver_sw.description: Filter by software git hash (exact match)

ver_sw_release_str.description: Filter by software release version string (prefix match)

analysis_version.description: Analysis version used when this log was last processed

description.description: Free text description of the flight

is_public.description: Whether this log appears in public listings

group_by.description: Column to group by (validated against allowlist in the handler).

limit.description: Maximum number of groups to return.

build_time.description: Server build time, ISO-8601 UTC (`unknown` if unavailable).

git_sha.description:
Short git SHA the server was built from (`-dirty` if the tree had
uncommitted changes, `unknown` for non-git builds).

tags.name: Logs
